name: Crawford Street United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Crawford Street United Methodist Church in Vicksburg, MS! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The court is free.

name: Halls Ferry Tennis Center Pickleball Park
description: Halls Ferry Tennis Center Pickleball Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Waltersville, MS. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Hawkins United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Hawkins United Methodist Church in Vicksburg, MS! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Purks YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Purks YMCA in Vicksburg, MS! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
